issues.description: generate_search_results() generates random fake LinkedIn profiles with simulated=True flag, returned as real pipeline execution results. random.randint(80, 200) profile count, random.choice() for name/title/company/city.

issues.description: stub_execute_skill() returns hardcoded {stub: True, result: 'mock_success', actions_taken: 0} instead of executing actual LinkedIn engagement. Called by daemon orchestrator._exec_cobaia_warmup() so it is user-visible.
issues.fix_hint: Wire to real linkedin MCP gateway. Delete stub_execute_skill entirely. Add runtime check that no stub paths reachable in production.
issues.resolved_by: UX-RM-F1-A commit 3ef83ee â€” stub_execute_skill deleted, orchestrator._exec_cobaia_warmup wired to _dispatch_cobaia_session_to_vm, RuntimeError guard added

issues.description: Sidebar contains 17 navigation items with no search/command palette. Non-technical user cannot quickly locate features.

issues.description: --text-3 (#55556a) on --s2 (#18181c) produces ~2.8:1, fails WCAG AA 4.5:1.

issues.description: 19+ interactive divs (.nav-item, .topbar-status, feed filters) missing role/tabindex/aria-label and onkeydown handlers. Cannot activate via Enter/Space.

issues.description: No <h1> element on any page. All pages start with <h3>, breaking heading hierarchy.

issues.description: Form labels not associated via for/id pairs. Examples: line 877, 1102-1117, 1243.

issues.description: Core flow split across 3+ pages: Prospects -> Propostas -> Auditoria -> back. Each transition = sidebar click + page reload + data refresh.

issues.description: 155+ onclick handlers + manual refreshCurrentPage(). No real-time WS updates on most pages.
